specific_question: As of 2024, what was the percentage of MediConn Solutions' patient interactions that required human intervention within the first 10 minutes of initial contact?
answer: As of November 2024, 80% of MediConn Solutions' patient interactions required human intervention within the first 10 minutes of initial contact.
dr_question: Starting in 2026 through Q1 2027, how can MediConn Solutions integrate the use of AI in creating the right patient experience, starting from the first touch point through care delivery and follow up to increase the number of patients that engage with their tele-health services?
